---
name: 功能建议 / Feature request
about: 为 luguo CLI 提一个新功能或改进 / Suggest a feature or improvement for the luguo CLI
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## 你想解决什么问题 / What problem are you trying to solve?
描述你遇到的场景，而不是直接给方案。/ Describe the situation you hit, not just the solution.

## 期望的功能 / Proposed feature
你希望 CLI 怎么做？/ What should the CLI do?

## 替代方案 / Alternatives
你目前是怎么绕过的？/ How do you work around it today?

## 补充信息 / Additional context
示例命令、相关 issue、参考链接等。/ Example commands, related issues, references.
